user_system_path: Master Audit #445 — gem-ranking fix. A live read-only forensic pass found the engine emits 'Nothing cleared the bar after evaluating N candidates' while real high-consequence gems sit in the admitted pool (a lapsing Rule 59(e) court motion, a job-offer acceptance, a hardship payment plan). Root cause: scorer stakes derived almost entirely from goal-match priority (6 - priority), defaulting to 1.0 with no goal match, so a genuine obligation is zeroed by the decision-moving (stakes >= 2) / lifecycle (stakes < 2 -> archive_only) invariants. Fix: highConsequenceStakesFloor in lib/briefing/scorer.ts lifts stakes from the commitment's own deterministic risk_score (>=80->4, >=60->3, >=40->2), lift-only, commitments-only. Fail-safe: noise cannot reach the floor (transactional/junk excluded at pool admission). NOT trust-aware ranking (the pool already filters trust_class — an earlier wrong diagnosis, corrected on #445). Constraint: NO paid API calls.
allowed_files_raw: The scorer stakes-floor (lib/briefing/scorer.ts) + its unit test + control-plane. No schema, no deps, no app/api.
forbidden_files_raw: No app/api, schema, or deps. Pure deterministic scoring change.
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npx vitest run lib/briefing && npm run typecheck
required_browser_proof: N/A — deterministic backend scoring change, exercised by unit + suite tests, not browser-observable.
acceptance_condition: highConsequenceStakesFloor lifts a high-risk_score commitment's stakes off the 1.0 goal-match floor (lift-only, commitments-only), threaded via candidate.riskScore; new unit test green against the real risk values; full lib/briefing suite + typecheck green; gate:continuity passes; #445 updated.
anti_regression_checks: full lib/briefing suite green + typecheck clean; change is additive (no logic deleted)
floor is lift-only and inert for signals/relationships and for fixtures without risk_score (no regression)
noise stays suppressed — transactional/junk commitments are still excluded at pool admission, untouched by this change
stop_condition: Stop when the stakes-floor is up as a PR with proof; owner validates one generation cycle surfaces a real gem instead of 'nothing cleared the bar'.
next_command: Owner: run one generation cycle and confirm a real gem clears the bar. Next seams (not done): extend the >30d-overdue admission window for high-consequence categories (so a stale-but-critical legal/work gem isn't dropped at line ~5077); the two-way test for relationship gems; merge DRAFT PR #454 (broadcast-sender suppression) after its paid validation.
